August 31st 1995

Log 3

[glued-in ticket: BORGUND STAVKYRKJE / FORENINGEN / TIL NORSKE FORTIDSMINNES- / MERKERS BEVARING / Kr. 100,- / 2880]
£1 = NK12
photo_captions: BORGUND STAVKYRKJE / FORENINGEN / TIL NORSKE FORTIDSMINNES- / MERKERS BEVARING / Kr. 100,- / 2880
pages.notes: Page contains a glued-in admission ticket for Borgund Stavkyrkje (Norwegian stave church), price Kr. 100, serial number 2880. Handwritten annotation on ticket: '£1 = NK12'. The address postcode reads 'B153[?]' — last character(s) unclear. 'Kirby' at top appears to be a name or label. No handwritten page number visible in top-left corner.

pages.notes: This is an index page: a numbered list mapping page numbers to places/trips. Entries are written in multiple ink colours (blue, black, dark red/brown), suggesting additions over time. Years 1995, 1996, 1997, 1998 appear inline against specific entries. Right margin is partially cut off in the scan, making some entries in the right column incomplete. Entry 19 reads 'Grandard' — likely 'Granard' (Irish town). Entry 20: last word could be 'Kircutt' or 'Karcutt' — unclear. Entry 33: 'Loeully' could be 'Loeuilly'. Entry 38: second word after Bourges unclear — possibly 'Foecy' or 'Féécy'. Entry 39 very hard to read — possibly 'Cassahiouse' / 'Cassagniouse'. Entry 41 possibly 'Vieuville'. Entry 42: 'Entragues' likely 'Entraygues'. Entry 43: 'Avon Armand' — uncertain. Entry 46: right side cut off. Entry 47: partially cut off. Entry 61: 'Bnas' possibly 'Anais'; 'Fetincy' possibly 'Fétigny'. Entry 65: 'Borgand' likely 'Borgund'. Entry 66: right side cut off — possibly 'Sognafjord, Schwangau' or similar. Entry 68: possibly 'Nigardsbreen glacier, Årdal, Urnes'. Entry 69: 'Trajvang' possibly 'Tryvann'. Entry 70: 'Holjes' possibly 'Holje'. Entry 71: possibly 'Humletorp Mårbäck'. Entry 74: 'Konasberg' likely 'Kongsberg'. Entry 75: 'Rjukan Vemost' — 'Vemost' likely 'Vemork' (Norsk Industriarbeidermuseum site). A handwritten annotation 'Steveton' (or similar) appears near entry 46 as a marginal note.
